prestazioni: Engine: Quad-Turbocharged 8.0L W16 (Engine Code: **WR16**) with reinforced forged internals (Mahle pistons, Carrillo connecting rods) and a **Motec M150 ECU** recalibration for 1,600+ HP on **102-octane race fuel**, optimizing ignition timing and turbo boost curves (2.1 bar peak) for sustained track use while maintaining the Pur Sport’s 6,900 RPM redline.

Forced Induction: Upgraded **Garrett GTX5544R Gen II** turbos (hybrid ceramic ball-bearing) with **Tial MV-R 60mm wastegates** and **Precision Turbo & Engine 7675 intercoolers** (dual-core, 1,200 CFM airflow) to eliminate heat soak during 20-minute track sessions, paired with a **Nitrous Express GenX Direct Port** system (50-shot progressive) for on-demand power.

Suspension & Chassis: **Öhlins TTX46 MkII coilovers** (3-way adjustable, 24-position rebound/compression) with **Eibach ERS race springs** (40% stiffer than OEM) and **Bugatti-specific spherical bearing control arms** (T6061 aluminum, 30% lighter) for sub-2.0s lateral G cornering. **AP Racing CP9661-4 calipers** (6-piston front, 4-piston rear) with **Carbon Revolution CR-9 carbon-ceramic rotors** (420mm front, 395mm rear) and **Ferodo DS3.12 race pads** for fade-free braking from 200+ mph.
estetica: Aerodynamics: **Liberty Walk LB-WORKS Chiron Pur Sport Track Pack** widebody kit (pre-preg carbon fiber, 30% lighter than OEM) with **Vorsteiner V-FF107 front splitter** (adjustable dive planes) and **Rocket Bunny GT rear diffuser** (3D-printed titanium supports). **Aeromotions active rear wing** (hydraulic, 3-position: 0°/12°/25°) with **Gurney flaps** (3D-printed Inconel) for 1,800 lbs of downforce at 180 mph.

Exterior: **PPF (Paint Protection Film) by XPEL Stealth** (matte finish) with **3M Scotchprint Wrap 2080 Series** custom graphics (gloss black/gunmetal flakes) and **HRE FF03 wheels** (20x11.5 front, 21x13 rear, forged magnesium, 18 lbs each) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** tires (345/30 R20 front, 355/25 R21 rear, track compound).

Interior: **Sparco Pro 2000 seats** (carbon-Kevlar shell, FIA 8862-2009 certified) with **Schroth 6-point harnesses** (ASM camlock) and **MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel** (suede, quick-release). **Aim Solo 2 DL GPS data logger** integrated with **Motec C127 dash** (OLED, 10Hz GPS) for real-time telemetry, paired with **Brembo brake bias adjuster** (cockpit-mounted).
